verification_artifact.final_report:
All requested fixes shipped + redeployed. Heirship is now using v3 backend with the fact extraction working end-to-end. ⏳ Deferred — 7 bugs, 4 work-items (each a real change, not a one-liner)

- A · Family-tree detail + live-update (#3, #5, #8) — #3 clicking a person-card opens a detail panel with their intake info (the card already sets selectedId but no panel renders); #5/#8 the tree re-renders live from in-progress WtData + additional heir intakes. A new tree subsystem panel + a WtData→tree binding.
- B · Heir-intake nav queue (#6, #7) — PersonSwitcher/IntakeQueueBar: #6 accumulate & keep ALL heir intakes visible; #7 clicking a name collapses its section instead of navigating to the james-identity step (labeled "Heir's name"). Queue-state + click-handler rework in TopBar/shells.
- C · Activity log (#9) — TA/attorney activity not updating with client activity. With #11, the aggregate now polls in place, so this points to a backend audit-event gap (client actions not emitted as events the aggregate's activity block surfaces). Backend investigation.
- D · Doc DOB extraction (#4) — DOB not pulled from uploaded docs. Analogous to the prior #9 extraction-completeness work — extraction-prompt / parsing behavior on the Gemini path.

Want me to continue with the deferred 7? I'd take them cluster-by-cluster (A → B → C → D), each gated + redeployed + Playwright-verified the same way — ideally in a fresh context so I'm not extending an already-long session. Your call.
